task_objective: Fix updater regression where dev-release to stable-release installs return to stale update state after reload
design_decisions: Removed confirmation requirement from _effective_pending_install_version to make pending installs immediately effective after record_update_install_requested.
Introduced _pending_install_matches_loaded_version helper to enable stable-equivalent promotion (e.g. matching stable X.Y.Z to X.Y.Z+metadata) and prevent incorrect dev promotion.
Modified startup reconciliation to retain any fresh unconfirmed pending installs during reload recovery TTL.
Updated frontend status-copy check from raw currentVersion.includes('dev') to effectiveCurrentVersion.includes('dev').
results: All python backend tests (458), static frontend tests, typescript compilation, build verify bundle, and OpenAI Codex review gates passed successfully. Changes committed to branch fix/updater-dev-to-stable-post-install-state.
